title: Built a ML trading model - looking to sell
author: Spirited_Syllabub488
selftext:
I’ve spent the last 2 years working on a BTC trading model that averages around **10–15% per month**, and from March till now it has returned roughly **+140% net**.  
The equity curve is attached below for transparency.

I’m considering selling the model because I don’t have a large trading capital to fully benefit from it myself.  
  
The model is fully ML-based, tested across multiple market conditions, and has been running consistently without major drawdowns.

If anyone wants to BUY or see more details, you can DM me directly.

https://preview.redd.it/4j7wsc447j3g1.png?width=1589&format=png&auto=webp&s=192d3756ea85b4839c116e8a173f3d1e2dcf2159

comments.author: Deatlev
comments.body: Why don't you trade with someone else's money? Give them a cut, get access to more capital.

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
I don't have such peoples access sir.....

By selling the model (not the ownership, just license) I will be using that money to trade this same model.

replies.author: Deatlev
replies.body: Seems like if you really can prove the performance (and general trading knowledge), a prop firm should accept you

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
The fact is it is not for Prop\_Firms.....  
They bound us to just 10% DD and there is no way a system could beat that....

Yes I can beat that but that would mean 1-2% average monthly ROI.... that would take me 12 months to complete the evaluation phase......

Not worth it the time.

replies.author: epicskyes
replies.body: It’s a solid model I’ve seen his metrics and the code. It’s consistent and profitable if you follow the signals religiously.

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
Yes sir absolutely.... It is a solid model with no overfitting and no false results in the report.... I just want to sell it to one person, also I will deliver the source code if one gives me a good price. 

Would you like to acquire the model sir?

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: If you have someone sir who is looking for a really profitable model, just let me know sir.

comments.author: yeah__good__ok
comments.body: The good news is if you are able to average 10% per month you can turn $1,000 into $92,709,069 over the next 10 years without selling anything. The bad news is this seems unlikely.

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: Absolutely I can, but the fact is as I said I don't even have that $1000.... I have hardly 300$...... Which I have grown from 100$ in the past 7 months..... These returns were extremely rare but on an average I have to assume 10%....... So I am selling it in a way that I also will be able to trade alongside the buyer..... With the funds I will get from selling it.

replies.author: yeah__good__ok
replies.body: With $300 and the 10% average per month you have to assume, you can still make over 90 million but it will take you about 11 years instead of 10.

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
Yeah man...... I can surely do that...
But see the time horizon....

do you think I, a retail trader have that much patience...
Also I don't think the ML could generate such returns in the next 10 years consistently...... It will perform this good for the next 2-3 years for sure.... But as BTC grows more popular the edge I discovered will gradually decrease.....

So why don't just hand it over to someone who has money and I just get the price of my hardwork.... 🙂

replies.author: Conscious_Tax_589
replies.body: No one buying your junk model champ 😂

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
It is not junk sir. It is pure ML  
[https://drive.google.com/file/d/1K5fyK7N1Y3u00U9CnYqo6pXdrnLynpBd/view?usp=drive\_link](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1K5fyK7N1Y3u00U9CnYqo6pXdrnLynpBd/view?usp=drive_link)  
  
read the report.

replies.author: Famous-Ambassador-39
replies.body: In September you had 5 figures and now you have 300?? 140% ROI?

comments.author: Adventurous_Chart360
comments.body: Can you provide some details on you ML model, back testing strategy etc ?

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1yZGuFUf8XecgE2kel1zahbt6JrvzUeBR5LrxyOvYOyg/edit?usp=drivesdk

This is the file of the backtest report sir of past 5 years till mid November, 2025... 

Rest we can talk in DM.

replies.author: Money-Recognition481
replies.body: Can you give me more details?

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: Can I know what specific details you are talking about so that I can provide you.

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
https://drive.google.com/file/d/1zFjMbZcW6Al-rr3xR0Kva1MI3qrO9wZ0/view?usp=drivesdk

Here is one report......

If you need more details just let me know what specific details.

replies.author: Money-Recognition481
replies.body: When I validate my models, I try to execute them on historical data too. I.e. I develop model that will play based on data 2020-2023 and predicts for 2024. Then I take same approach for dates 2010-2015, etc. Did you try such apprach?

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
I understand what you are saying....

But for this current model what I have done is I took data from 2017 to 2020. used this 4 years of data and trained my ML model to predict first sequence... and then repeat predicting with past learning.... Now there might be some learning issues when newer data comes in. So what i have done is I retrain my model every 5 days with newer data and repeat and retrain and predict and then retrain....................

Like this the model adapts with newer market data, no overfitting............

Using this approach I backtested 5 years of data from 2021-Present.. And every regime is present in those 5 years, Bear-Market, Bull-Market, Range ... (I guess)...........

comments.author: muuuurderers
comments.body: Ill start the bidding at half a snickers bar, and a tramps left shoe. Let me know.

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: I don't thing you get the points. You must stay out of the market sir. Once you see the MODEL\_REPORT you will say "It is too good to be true." I am not selling a ema crossover strategy or a RSI oversold-overbought condition loosing strategy. It is a ML model. You don't even have any idea on how my model works. If you like I could send the model report. May I?
